# Account Invoice Download OVH

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:31bbb6ae3c304fb8c463092b06e297ac22121cadd5b5fc0204324f571df548c9
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds an OVH backend to the **account_invoice_download** module. It allows you to auto-download [OVH](https://www.ovh.com) invoices via the [OVH API](https://api.ovh.com/).

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

Before installing the module, you need to install the [OVH python lib](https://github.com/ovh/python-ovh) via the following command:

```
sudo pip3 install --upgrade ovh
```

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to go to the menu *Invoicing > Configuration > Import Vendor Bills > Download Bills* and create one entry per OVH Account. Select *OVH* as *Backend*.

If you don't already have the required parameters to access the OVH API (Application key, Application secret and Consumer key) with the appropriate access level on the APIs used by this module, clic on the button **Generate OVH API Credentials** once *OVH* is selected as Backend and follow the instructions of the wizard.

## Usage

Refer to the usage instructions of the module **account_invoice_download**.
